meaning: n.[鸟]鹬,香烟屁股,狙击,被开玩笑的人物vi.猎鸟,狙击,诽谤vt.狙击
examples: There was not much elbow room in the cockpit of a Snipe.
Imagine that there is some activity - say, snipe hunting - that members of Congress want to encourage.
A snipe flew over and saw a piece of red meat on the ground, so it dived to the ground and pecked at the clam.
The beach is also popular with birdwatchers who come in hopeof seeing the rare golden eye snipe.
The habitat is already attracting birds such as sedge and reed warblers, cuckoo, snipe, woodcock and oystercatcher.
